name: Vega-Lite (+vega-embed)
when_to_use: 需要用声明式 JSON 做多视图刷选联动、交叉过滤、分面或复合统计图时用它而非手写事件化 SVG,因为原生手写在视图间信号、尺度与过滤状态同步上失败;静态单一柱线饼非做它。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能仿静态图,做不到多视图刷选、交叉过滤和尺度/信号一致性;Vega-Lite 把这些逻辑封进可校验 JSON spec,避免徒手事件代码。

data_in.note: data_in.spec 是 Vega-Lite v6 原生 JSON spec,由 vega-embed 编译并挂载;不是 Vega runtime spec,也不是自造图表 schema。

spec.mark?: Vega-Lite Mark | MarkDef —— unit spec 必填,compound spec 默认无顶层 mark

encoding?.x?: FieldDef | DatumDef | ValueDef —— 默认无 x 通道
encoding?.y?: FieldDef | DatumDef | ValueDef —— 默认无 y 通道
encoding?.color?: FieldDef | DatumDef | ValueDef —— 默认无 color 通道
encoding?.size?: FieldDef | DatumDef | ValueDef —— 默认无 size 通道
encoding?.tooltip?: FieldDef | FieldDef[] | ValueDef —— 默认无 tooltip 编码

spec.layer?: Vega-Lite LayerSpec[] —— 默认无;与 mark 单元分支二选一
spec.hconcat?: Vega-Lite Spec[] —— 默认无;横向多视图分支
spec.vconcat?: Vega-Lite Spec[] —— 默认无;纵向多视图分支
spec.params?: Vega-Lite Parameter[] —— 默认 [];其中 select 是上游原生刷选语法,不是平台事件契约
spec.width?: number | 'container' —— 默认由 Vega-Lite 推断

embed_options?.tooltip?: boolean —— boot 默认 false,开启时会产生 shadow 外的 tooltip 足迹

spec.note: Vega-Lite spec 的 height 省略时由 boot 注入 400px;只传数值像素,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。组合/分面图的子视图尺寸仍由原生 spec 控制。

example._why: Vega-Lite 是深 config / 高歧义图表语法,必须给可直接编译的最小 v6 spec。

peer.note: boot 通过兼容 Vega-Lite 6 的 vega-embed 7 完成编译和挂载;本条 upstream 版本仍严格记录 picks 中的 vega-lite 6.4.3。

carriers.widget: conditional:默认 actions:false、tooltip:false 时 SVG/canvas 落 shadow 容器;开启 embed 菜单或 tooltip 会产生 shadow 外样式/DOM 足迹
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG/canvas;默认关闭菜单与 tooltip,无上行依赖

isolation.evidence: vega-embed@7 +esm injects `<style id='vega-embed-style'>` (gated by `defaultStyle!==false`) BUT is shadow-aware: the internal root resolver returns `{root: shadowRoot, rootContainer: shadowRoot}` when `el.getRootNode()` is a ShadowRoot, else `document.head`. The widget boot appends el to shadowRoot BEFORE calling embed(), so the style scopes to shadow — no document.head footprint on that path (artifact/codex non-shadow paths do hit head). With actions:false the action menu renders inside the .vega-embed container; tooltip:false avoids the body `#vg-tooltip` element (only the head/body fallback ref is `document.head??document.body`). globalEvents=no is for the default self-contained config (view binds to its own scenegraph); not exhaustively byte-traced.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need declarative JSON for linked multi-view brushing, cross-filtering, faceting, or compound statistical charts, instead of hand-writing event-driven SVG, because native implementations fail at synchronizing signals, scales, and filter state across views. Not for a static single bar/line/pie chart.
en.why_valuable: AI can only imitate static charts by default; it cannot provide multi-view brushing, cross-filtering, or consistent scales/signals. Vega-Lite packages that logic into a verifiable JSON spec, avoiding hand-written event code.

data_in.note: data_in.spec is a native Vega-Lite v6 JSON spec, compiled and mounted by vega-embed. It is not a Vega runtime spec or a custom chart schema.

spec.mark?: Vega-Lite Mark | MarkDef -- Required for a unit spec; a compound spec has no top-level mark by default

encoding?._default: {}; channel mappings for a unit spec
encoding?.x?: FieldDef | DatumDef | ValueDef -- No x channel by default
encoding?.y?: FieldDef | DatumDef | ValueDef -- No y channel by default
encoding?.color?: FieldDef | DatumDef | ValueDef -- No color channel by default
encoding?.size?: FieldDef | DatumDef | ValueDef -- No size channel by default
encoding?.tooltip?: FieldDef | FieldDef[] | ValueDef -- No tooltip encoding by default

spec.layer?: Vega-Lite LayerSpec[] -- None by default; mutually exclusive with the mark unit branch
spec.hconcat?: Vega-Lite Spec[] -- None by default; horizontal multi-view branch
spec.vconcat?: Vega-Lite Spec[] -- None by default; vertical multi-view branch
spec.params?: Vega-Lite Parameter[] -- Default []; select uses upstream native brush syntax, not a platform event contract
spec.width?: number | 'container' -- Inferred by Vega-Lite by default

embed_options?.tooltip?: boolean -- boot default false; enabling it creates a tooltip footprint outside shadow

spec.note: When height is omitted from the Vega-Lite spec, boot injects 400px. Pass numeric pixels only; Rule 3 prohibits vh/percentage height. Child-view sizes in compound/faceted charts remain controlled by the native spec.
